microsoft_ft: Served as **delivery lead** for Azure's enterprise resilience program, owning end-to-end execution across internal teams, external partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), and executive stakeholders across **45+ annual drills**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by **30%** and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience drill program, sequencing work across compliance, hardware, and partner dependencies to hit a **94% recovery rate** in a 4-month delivery window.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict compliance requirements.

Built an internal AI agent to automate status reporting, risk synthesis, and planning documentation, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Managed scope, RAID logs, and stakeholder alignment simultaneously across workstreams, keeping **C-level sponsors** accurately informed on milestone progress without requiring them to navigate technical detail.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI workflow adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading hands-on demos and training, embedding AI-driven code generation into daily delivery operations and saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Surfaced critical feature gaps through **11+ structured user interviews** with enterprise service teams, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a top delivery requirement.

Accelerated information retrieval by **83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, establishing metadata standards that improved dependency tracing across multi-team delivery workflows.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in revenue through faster go-live sequencing.

Led stakeholder discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical-path tasks and reduce dependency on manual coordination.

Built a **Power BI delivery dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the visibility needed to prioritize high-impact automation investments and sequence workstreams effectively.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration by owning the delivery plan end-to-end, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing rollout to avoid cascading failures.

Ran Agile sprint ceremonies including planning, retrospectives, and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process across a multi-team delivery environment.

Coordinated IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, holding partners accountable across organizational boundaries and accelerating software deployment cycles by 25%.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, redesigning the CRM workflow to eliminate manual handoffs and track change requests consistently.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence to align outbound messaging with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a prioritized recommendation to close the highest-impact gaps first.
